SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.dialect

Class AbstractDBDialect

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.dialect.AbstractDBDialect
All Implemented Interfaces:
SQLDialect
Direct Known Subclasses:
DB2Dialect, DerbyDialect, H2Dialect, MySqlDialect, OracleDialect, PostgresDialect, SybaseDialect
public abstract class AbstractDBDialect extends Object implements SQLDialect
Abstract base class for database dialect implementations.

Defines common behavior and extension points for handling database-specific SQL generation and features.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda
